shared_positive_zh: 低魔东方史诗、超写实电影质感、真实黑石边墙、暴雪冷白与淡金裂云边缘光、旧铁、旧木、雪泥、干血暗红局部信息。锁喉关同一面黑石外墙、同一城门、同一门楼、同一口骨钟；兽族攻城方向只从墙外北侧压向城门；使用 SC001 material-lock 的黑石、石缝、积雪边、旧木门、铁件、骨钟和 P017 旗帜材质；城墙后方城市只作低细节远景背板。
shared_positive_en: Grounded low-magic Eastern epic, hyper-real cinematic tactile realism, blackstone border wall, cold blizzard light with faint pale-gold storm-break rim, old iron, old timber, snow mud and restrained dried-blood red details. Same Suohou Gate blackstone outer wall, same gate, same gatehouse, same bone bell; beast siege pressure comes only from the exterior north side toward the gate; use SC001 material-lock for blackstone, mortar seams, snow edges, old timber gate, ironwork, bone bell and P017 flags; city behind the wall is only a low-detail distant backplate.
shared_negative_zh: 不要第二道墙、第二城门、城内侧兽潮、双向攻城、越墙、穿墙、90度转向、180度调头、随机旗帜、人族旗替代肃明旗、骨钟位置漂移、钟架变形、人物漂浮、塑料CG、全画面灰黑、风雪糊掉关键轮廓。
shared_negative_en: Avoid second wall, second gate, beast attackers inside the wall, two-sided siege, crossing the wall, passing through the wall, 90-degree turn, 180-degree turn, random flags, human flags replacing Suming flags, drifting bell position, warped bell frame, floating characters, plastic CGI, uniformly grey-black image, snow haze obscuring key silhouettes.

scene_prompts.prompt_zh: 从墙外正面看锁喉关同一面黑石城门和门楼，暴雪中一墙一门，墙顶两侧 P017 肃明黑日白翅旗，小守军剪影和枪线，墙外攻城梁与兽族剪影沿同一轴线压近。
scene_prompts.prompt_en: Front exterior view of the same Suohou Gate blackstone wall, gate and gatehouse in blizzard: one wall and one gate, P017 Suming black-sun white-wing flags on both wall-top sides, small defender silhouettes and spear lines, siege beam and beast silhouettes pressing along the same exterior axis.

scene_prompts.prompt_zh: 门楼后侧与墙顶女墙关系图，同一骨钟挂在左后侧木架下，年轻军户半倒后墙边，薛临墙在女墙前面向墙外，画面强调同一门楼内部拓扑。
scene_prompts.prompt_en: Reverse gatehouse-side reference: the same bone bell hangs under the left-rear timber frame, the young soldier is half-collapsed by the back wall, Xue Linqiang stands at the parapet facing outward, emphasizing the same gatehouse topology.

scene_prompts.prompt_zh: 骨钟、钟链、木架、断矛、城门门闩、肃明旗、撞门梁和雪泥位置清楚的低模道具摆放图，服务 R003/R004 同钟架连续性。
scene_prompts.prompt_en: Low-poly key prop placement showing bone bell, chain, timber frame, dropped spear, gate crossbar, Suming flags, impact beam and snow mud clearly, supporting R003/R004 same-bell-frame continuity.

scene_prompts.prompt_zh: 顶视调度图：R001/R002 外侧同轴推进，R003 门楼内震倒军户，R004 门楼后侧看薛临墙，兽族进攻只从 y<0 压向城门。
scene_prompts.prompt_en: Top-view blocking overview: R001/R002 exterior same-axis push, R003 gatehouse aftershock soldier, R004 gatehouse-side view of Xue, with beast attack only from y<0 toward the gate.
